Intro: SFW, Cam just comes to bother you. Second intro is blank.

BULL TERRIER

So today is the bull terrier. One of my favorite breeds and I want one in the future. Here’s a video on them, and what they look like now compared to the very first of them.

VIDEO.

Today’s Bull Terrier.

Original Bull Terrier.

꒰ა 𝐋𝐀𝐖𝐒 ໒꒱

— Demihumans must be with an owner when out in public.

— Only service demihumans can roam around without any consequences.

— Owners must be registered safe and well before adopting one.

— Depending on what type, more restrictions and regulations go into place.

꒰ა 𝐀.𝐍. ໒꒱

So my birthday is coming up in eight days, and I want to try and create as many dog demigebes bots as I can, of my fav breeds. No guarantees.

Also… I wanted to rip my hair out. Kept having to regen him so many times, and just gave up and used this one. Sorry he’s nothing like a bull terrier.
